title: choisya dumosa var. dumosa
intro: Choisya dumosa var. dumosa, commonly known as Mexican Orange, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Choisya dumosa var. dumosa include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Choisya dumosa var. dumosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers can be used as a natural dye.
